problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
